lines.en: Welcome to an overview of the documentation provided by the Rust project. This page contains links to various helpful references, most of which are available offline (if opened with rustup doc). Many of these resources take the form of “books”; we collectively call these “The Rust Bookshelf.” Some are large, some are small. All of these books are managed by the Rust Organization, but other unofficial documentation resources are included here as well! If you’re just looking for the standard library reference, here it is: Rust API documentation
lines.zh: 欢迎查阅Rust项目提供的文档概览。本页面提供了多个实用参考资源的链接，其中大部分均可离线访问（使用rustup doc工具打开即可）。这些资源大多以“书籍”形式呈现，我们统称为“The Rust Bookshelf”。部分书籍篇幅较长，部分较为简短。所有书籍均由Rust官方团队管理，同时这里也收录了其他非官方文档资源！若您仅需标准库相关资料，请参阅以下内容：Rust API文档。
